textByHash.366d10796f58124e96ffce96778686fce9cfc2b5: Well much of the day-to-day running is handled by the Colosseum Master, but yes, I am the one in overall charge of this place.
textByHash.a2008d6d21a73bef5c578929b82211421c56cac3: I am the teoki responsible for the Colosseum. I am in charge of all that happens here.
textByHash.e7555e7e062a8dae05944aeb85ce161ae59048c5: It is these offerings that sustain him. Without them, he will not have the strength to light our way.
textByHash.f48102b070670982157071b2cfd4c2f37406a3f3: This is more than just a place of spectacle. You stand in one of the holiest sites in all of Varlamore. Each drop of blood spilt here is a glorious offering to Ralos.
